news.title:
DCM Shriram's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 3,811 Cr; PBDIT up 4%.
Chemicals revenue grew 30%, PBDIT fell 8%. Sugar/Ethanol PBDIT nearly doubled. PVC faces pricing pressure.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram's Q3 FY26 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 3,811 Cr; PBDIT up 4%.
Chemicals revenue grew 30%, PBDIT fell 8%. Sugar/Ethanol PBDIT nearly doubled. PVC faces pricing pressure.

news.title:
DCM Shriram aims for FY27 cash profit growth via chemical expansions.
Strategic restructuring supports DCM Shriram's profit growth targets.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram aims for FY27 cash profit growth via chemical expansions.
Strategic restructuring supports DCM Shriram's profit growth targets.

news.title:
Persistent Systems reports 23rd growth quarter with 5.5% revenue rise but 6.7% profit dip due to one-time impact.
United Spirits beats profit/revenue estimates; DCM Shriram's profit falls 19% YoY while Shoppers Stop profit plunges.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems reports 23rd growth quarter with 5.5% revenue rise but 6.7% profit dip due to one-time impact.
United Spirits beats profit/revenue estimates; DCM Shriram's profit falls 19% YoY while Shoppers Stop profit plunges.

news.title:
DCM Shriram Ltd’s Q3 FY26 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 3,811 cr, driven by Chemicals and Sugar-Ethanol growth. PBDIT stood at Rs 426 cr, flat YoY.
Key highlights include Chemicals volume growth, improved sugar prices, ethanol blending at 20%, and Fenesta's 28% revenue increase, despite margin pressures.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram Ltd’s Q3 FY26 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 3,811 cr, driven by Chemicals and Sugar-Ethanol growth. PBDIT stood at Rs 426 cr, flat YoY.
Key highlights include Chemicals volume growth, improved sugar prices, ethanol blending at 20%, and Fenesta's 28% revenue increase, despite margin pressures.

news.title:
DCM Shriram Ltd cancelled the Trading Plan of Mr. Amit Agarwal, ED & Group CFO.
The Audit Committee approved the cancellation under SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015, on 20th Jan 2026.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram Ltd cancelled the Trading Plan of Mr. Amit Agarwal, ED & Group CFO.
The Audit Committee approved the cancellation under SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015, on 20th Jan 2026.

news.title:
DCM Shriram announces 2nd interim dividend of Rs.3.6/share, totaling Rs.7.2/share for FY25-26.
Q3 standalone PAT at Rs.201.4 cr; consolidated at Rs.212.6 cr, with Rs.55 cr exceptional item.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram announces 2nd interim dividend of Rs.3.6/share, totaling Rs.7.2/share for FY25-26.
Q3 standalone PAT at Rs.201.4 cr; consolidated at Rs.212.6 cr, with Rs.55 cr exceptional item.

news.title:
DCM Shriram's board to meet on 20 Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25-26 results & consider 2nd interim dividend.
Record date for dividend, if approved, is 24 Jan 2026; trading window closed till 22 Jan 2026.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram's board to meet on 20 Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25-26 results & consider 2nd interim dividend.
Record date for dividend, if approved, is 24 Jan 2026; trading window closed till 22 Jan 2026.

news.title:
DCM Shriram faces Rs. 85.8 lakh GST demand from Kota CGST authority.
The demand pertains to FY18-23 and disallows Input Tax Credit on cargo handling services.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram faces Rs. 85.8 lakh GST demand from Kota CGST authority.
The demand pertains to FY18-23 and disallows Input Tax Credit on cargo handling services.

news.title:
DCM Shriram's subsidiary, Bioseed Research USA Inc., was liquidated on Dec 15, 2025.
The subsidiary had nil turnover for FY 2024-25 and a net worth of $3,271 as of Mar 31, 2025.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram's subsidiary, Bioseed Research USA Inc., was liquidated on Dec 15, 2025.
The subsidiary had nil turnover for FY 2024-25 and a net worth of $3,271 as of Mar 31, 2025.

news.title: DCM Shriram shares surge nearly 6% post MoU with Bayer CropScience.
news.summary: DCM Shriram shares surge nearly 6% post MoU with Bayer CropScience.

news.title:
DCM Shriram Industries posts Q2 net loss of ₹31.2M vs ₹229M profit YoY.
Revenue drops to ₹4.99B from ₹5.33B; EBITDA margin falls to 1.83% vs 8.72% YoY.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram Industries posts Q2 net loss of ₹31.2M vs ₹229M profit YoY.
Revenue drops to ₹4.99B from ₹5.33B; EBITDA margin falls to 1.83% vs 8.72% YoY.

news.title:
DCM Shriram's assessed income for AY 2022-23 is ₹1,596.5 Cr vs filed ₹1,086.5 Cr.
Tax demand of ₹249.3 Cr raised; company plans legal challenge and rectification.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram's assessed income for AY 2022-23 is ₹1,596.5 Cr vs filed ₹1,086.5 Cr.
Tax demand of ₹249.3 Cr raised; company plans legal challenge and rectification.

news.title:
DCM Shriram announces retirement of Dr. Paresh Verma, Executive Director, effective 31 Oct 2025.
Dr. Verma retires after 23 years, ceasing to be Senior Management Personnel on the said date.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram announces retirement of Dr. Paresh Verma, Executive Director, effective 31 Oct 2025.
Dr. Verma retires after 23 years, ceasing to be Senior Management Personnel on the said date.

news.title: DCM Shriram considers demerger of select segments to enhance shareholder value.
news.summary: DCM Shriram considers demerger of select segments to enhance shareholder value.

news.title: DCM Shriram sees margin growth driven by higher volumes in caustic soda, hydrogen peroxide, and glycerin sales.
news.summary: DCM Shriram sees margin growth driven by higher volumes in caustic soda, hydrogen peroxide, and glycerin sales.

news.title:
DCM Shriram expands into high-value chemicals, focusing on epichlorohydrin, epoxy, salt integration, and CBG investments.
The company targets margin recovery in sugar, ethanol, and steady agribusiness growth through FY27.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram expands into high-value chemicals, focusing on epichlorohydrin, epoxy, salt integration, and CBG investments.
The company targets margin recovery in sugar, ethanol, and steady agribusiness growth through FY27.

news.title:
DCM Shriram Ltd presented Q2 FY2026 financial results highlighting revenue growth and strong performance in caustic soda segment.
The company announced strategic advancements, including HSCL acquisition and Epichlorohydrin commissioning, boosting growth in advanced materials.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram Ltd presented Q2 FY2026 financial results highlighting revenue growth and strong performance in caustic soda segment.
The company announced strategic advancements, including HSCL acquisition and Epichlorohydrin commissioning, boosting growth in advanced materials.

news.title:
DCM Shriram declared Rs 3.6 interim dividend; Q2, H1 FY26 financials approved.
New plant commissioned, specialty chemicals firm acquired, RTA changed to KFin Tech.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram declared Rs 3.6 interim dividend; Q2, H1 FY26 financials approved.
New plant commissioned, specialty chemicals firm acquired, RTA changed to KFin Tech.

news.title:
DCM Shriram will acquire 100% equity of four salt-producing firms for Rs. 175 crore.
The acquisition aims to integrate its chemical business into salt production, completing by June 2026.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram will acquire 100% equity of four salt-producing firms for Rs. 175 crore.
The acquisition aims to integrate its chemical business into salt production, completing by June 2026.

news.title: DCM Shriram declares ₹3.60 dividend per share, signaling positive investor commitment.
news.summary: DCM Shriram declares ₹3.60 dividend per share, signaling positive investor commitment.
